title: cynoglossum glabellum
intro: Cynoglossum glabellum, also known as the smooth tongue flower or tongue flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum glabellum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis. Cynoglossum glabellum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
